description.description: Human-readable summary of what this monitoring extension observes.
description.title: Description

logs.description: OpenSearch log lanes this extension owns; each lane names the index it writes and the untrusted-lane service.name values the collector routes into it. At least one lane is required.

index.description: OpenSearch index this lane writes telemetry into.
index.title: Index

retention.description: ISM participation for the lane: 'default' (or empty) joins the shared clawker retention policy; 'custom' means the extension ships its own ism-policies/ files scoped to its indices.
retention.title: Retention

service_names.description: Untrusted-lane service.name values the collector routes into this lane's index.
service_names.title: Service Names

logs.title: Logs

metrics.description: Optional collector-side shaping for this extension's metrics on the shared untrusted metrics pipeline; omit when no reshaping is needed.

datapoint_renames.description: Datapoint attribute copies applied to this extension's metrics, scoped to its service names.

from.description: Source datapoint attribute key to copy.
from.title: From

to.description: Destination datapoint attribute key the source value lands on.
to.title: To

datapoint_renames.title: Datapoint Renames

service_names.description: Metric service.name values the renames below apply to; empty defaults to the union of the extension's log-lane service names.
service_names.title: Service Names

metrics.title: Metrics
